title: Taxi QR Payment
scenario: After arriving abroad, a driver says the card terminal is broken and asks you to scan a QR code to pay. The page asks for your card number, security code, and online banking login.

answers.A: Enter all details because the ride is already finished.
answers.B: Ask the driver to wait while I try the QR payment.
answers.C: Refuse to enter banking credentials and use a safer payment method.
answers.D: Use an official taxi app, receipt process, or trusted payment terminal instead.

explanation: QR payment scams can send travelers to fake payment pages. A payment page should never ask for online banking login credentials.
proTip: If a payment flow asks for more than normal card/payment approval details, stop and switch to a trusted method.
